message.content:
@startuml
title Retrieve Part value

actor "User" as User
participant "libdrift" as libdrift
participant "Advertisement channel" as AdChannel
participant "Control channel" as CtrlChannel
participant "driftd" as driftd
participant "Neo4j" as Neo4j
participant "MongoDB" as MongoDB

rectangle "driftd service" {
  libdrift
  AdChannel
  CtrlChannel
  driftd
}

User -> libdrift: get Part value
note right of User: Retrieval message contains\nindex specifier\nindex value
libdrift -> CtrlChannel: send retrieval message
CtrlChannel -> User: ACK
CtrlChannel -> driftd: get Part value
driftd -> driftd: Lookup Part UUID in index
driftd -> Neo4j: Get Part info

alt [Composite Part]
  loop [foreach Part]
    driftd -> Neo4j: Get Part metadata with UUID
    driftd -> MongoDB: Get Part values
  end
else [Simple Part]
  driftd -> Neo4j: Get Part metadata with UUID
  driftd -> MongoDB: Get Part values
end

driftd -> driftd: build update message
driftd -> AdChannel: Update messages for Part values
AdChannel -> User: receive update message

@enduml
